description: Product description Cute girls fairy wings set includes fairy Wings, Wand and Tutu, 3 pcs fairy accessories. This pink fairy costume will make your sweetheart looks more active and dynamic. Our fairy costume wings set is perfect for costume parties, cosplay, masquerade or just as a great birthday gift for your girl. ✔✔Features of pink fairy wings costume: ❋Butterfly wing and skirt are designed with elastic band ❋Shiny and beautiful ❋Ideal for dressing up fairy princess ❋Occasion: fairy costumes for Themed costume parties, Halloween celebrations, Birthday party, Fancy Dress etc ✔✔Please note: ❋This pink custume set suit for girls over 3 years old. ❋Kids should enjoy the fairy wings set under the direct supervision of adult. ❋Please DO NOT wash wings, wand. ❋Please Wash the tutu skirt in 30° warm water by hand without dryer and bleach. ❋The stars of wand CANNOT be squeezed due to air inside. ✔✔Specifications: ❋Color: pink ❋Material: soft fabric ❋Size: as picture shows ❋Package Included: 1 x Magic Wand, 1 x Butterfly Wing, 1 x Tutu Skirt The dress up wings and sequins tutu skirt are the perfect accessories for your little fairy or princess. She will has so much fun in this fairy costumes because she can be a fairy princess with this. Dressing up in pink butterfly wings, little girls can use their creativity and imagination to play as a magical fairy. Safety Warning no
